message:
fix(conformance): update shutdown_invalid_flag to match new validation

TurquoiseBluff tightened SHUTDOWN validation to return "ERR syntax error"
for invalid flags instead of the verbose error message. Update the
conformance fixture to match.

Also commit concurrent work: BGSAVE/SHUTDOWN validation parity,
SLOWLOG arity fixes, CLIENT LIST filters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
